events.eventbus.tagentry.CfnAbout: A key-value pair associated with an AWS resource. In EventBridge, rules and event buses support tagging.

events.eventbus.tagentry.Key.Description: A string you can use to assign a value. The combination of tag keys and values can help you organize and categorize your resources.

events.eventbus.tagentry.Value.Description: The value for the specified tag key.
